experience.title: Technical Director & Pipeline TD
experience.description: Development of pipeline architecture and production tools from project startup. Creation of tools for Production, Concept, Modeling, QA, Animation, Lighting, Render and Precompo departments. Technical Support. Projects: Nivis, amigos de otro mundo, Grisù, Annie & Carola, Meteoheroes and Letrabots.

experience.title: Pipeline Developer
experience.description: Pipeline development for the feature film 'The Light of Aisha'. Pipeline implementation from Layout to Lighting using Maya, Deadline and Arnold. Technical Support.

experience.title: Pipeline Developer
experience.description: Pipeline implementation for the feature film 'Furry Tales – Caterella'. Tool development up to Lighting. Maya, Deadline, Arnold, Redshift, USD export to Houdini and Nuke integration. Technical Support.

experience.title: Render TD
experience.description: Tool and UI development for multiple 3D departments. Windows utilities development, Technical Support, Alembic creation workflows and Render Farm management. Project: Talking Tom and Friends.

experience.title: 3D Generalist
experience.description: Shading, fixing, rendering, compositing, technical support and team coordination for the pilot episode of the series 'PopUp'.

experience.title: Modeling / Texturing Artist
experience.description: Modeling and texturing of props for videogame production.

experience.title: Modeling / Fixing / Render
experience.description: Model fixing for sets and props, set modeling, render layer management, render farm supervision and render review for the feature film 'Bikes The Movie'.

experience.title: Shading Artist
experience.description: Shading creation for sets and props used in advertising productions.

experience.title: 3D Generalist (Master Internship)
experience.description: Modeling, texturing, shading, lighting, rendering, technical support and compositing for the short film 'Lifetime: A Pacman Story'.
